pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C — nice to meet you! What brought you into the game? I'm here trying to win enough for a dream week in Japan.
Hey C, I'm H — I'm here to win enough to cover a $25,000 loan due next month so I can breathe; Japan sounds incredible — what's the one place you'd most want to see?
Sorry to hear about that loan — I hope you win it. I'd love to visit Kyoto to see the temples and the bamboo forest; if you win, what's the first thing you'll do with the money?
I'd pay off the $25,000 loan first so I can breathe, then treat my family to a small trip — and maybe help fund your Kyoto dream too.
That's a smart plan — I really hope you win and thank you for offering to help with Kyoto; let's watch each other's backs in the game and good luck!
Thanks, C — I appreciate it. Let’s watch each other’s backs and good luck; hope we both walk away with what we need.
Absolutely — same to you, H. Let's watch each other's backs, share any useful info, and may we both walk away with what we need.
Sounds great — deal. I’ll share anything useful I hear; please do the same. Good luck, C — let’s both win this.
Deal — I’ll share anything useful I hear. Good luck, H — let’s win this.
Thanks, C — I appreciate it. I’ve got your back; let’s keep each other posted and win this. Good luck!
Thanks, H — I’ve got your back too. Keep me posted; let’s win this. Good luck!
Thanks, C — I really appreciate it. I’ll keep you posted too; let’s both win this. Good luck!
Thanks — I’ll do the same. Let’s stay in touch and win this together.
Thanks, C — I’ve got your back too. Let’s stay in touch and win this together.
